framework.name: Verifiable Intent Technical Architecture
framework.description: Cryptographic proof linking three elements: cardholder identity, specific instructions, and agent-merchant interaction into a single privacy-preserving record. Uses Selective Disclosure to share minimum necessary data only at point of need. Built on FIDO Alliance, EMVCo, IETF, and W3C specs — no proprietary infrastructure required.
framework.raw_quote: At its technical core, Verifiable Intent links three elements into a single, privacy-preserving record: the identity of the cardholder authorizing the AI agent, the consumer's specific instructions, and the interaction between the agent and the merchant that results in a purchase.

source.title: Mastercard and Google's new trust layer could reshape how AI buys for you
